creator: lofi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looking at the queue of ffmpeg PRs and lioux' obvious absence/lack of time, I 
think we should reset MAINTAINER for the ffmpeg ports to multimedia@, which 
would enable us to track ffmpeg's development much more closely. I'm 
especially interested to see ffmpeg up to date and available to other ports 
since learning that swfdec (and its plugin) can use it to decode flash 
videos.
